title: The Last Lighthouse
author: Mara Ellison
description: A coastal family uncovers buried secrets while trying to save a fading harbor town.

title: Midnight at Willow House
author: Jonah Pierce
description: A quiet inheritance becomes a race to understand the past before it reshapes the present.

title: Practical Next.js Systems
author: Avery Chen
description: Modern patterns for building fast, maintainable web applications with the Next.js app router.

title: MongoDB in Action
author: Nina Patel
description: A hands-on guide to designing reliable data models, indexes, and scalable queries.

title: The Curious Orbit
author: Elliot Vega
description: A vivid journey through planetary motion, cosmic distances, and the science of observation.

title: Signals in the Snow
author: Priya Nair
description: How polar research helps scientists understand climate systems and changing ecosystems.

title: Harbor of Letters
author: Sofia Laurent
description: A librarian's map collection leads to a hidden archive and a story spanning generations.

title: Designing Secure Auth Flows
author: Caleb Morgan
description: A focused reference for building safer sign-in systems, sessions, and protected routes.

title: The Biology of Everyday Life
author: Leah Brooks
description: An accessible look at how cells, microbes, and genes shape ordinary human experiences.

title: Between the Streetlights
author: Daniel Rios
description: Two strangers form a bond that changes the rhythm of a city block and its neighbors.

title: Frontend Performance Patterns
author: Hana Kim
description: Techniques for shipping responsive interfaces that stay fast under real-world pressure.

title: The Shape of Evidence
author: Owen Carter
description: A broad science primer on how experiments, data, and peer review build trustworthy knowledge.
